name: HNMS Z 7 (H 93)
events: 20 Mar 1940 Around 0730 hours, HrMs O 21 (Lt.Cdr. J.F. van Dulm, RNN) departed Den Helder for Flushing where she arrived around 1615 hours. She was joined around 1000 hours by HrMs Z 7 (Lt.Cdr. H. Witte, RNN) which then escorted her until around 1450 hours.
[Time kept in the Netherlands at this time was GMT + 20 minutes.] (1)
